name: devils-advocate
description: Complementary confirmation-bias guard for Claude Code. Three components: prompt-critic (UserPromptSubmit hook, injects a system-reminder asking the main Claude to dispatch the devils-advocate-critic subagent on decision-content prompts), response-critic (Stop hook, Haiku→Opus async background review), and the /devils-advocate skill (Opus + extended thinking, manual deep critique with Independence Gate).
